name: J1939TestJoinDMWithSPNEvent
title: J1939TestJoinDMWithSPNEvent
syntax: long J1939TestJoinDMWithSPNEvent( dword sourceAddr, dword pgn, dword spn )
description: Adds a new SPN event to the 'joined events'. The function does not wait.
The parameter group must be able to contain a SPN, so only this parameter groups are allowed: DM1, DM2, DM6, DM12, DM23, DM27, DM28 and DM41-DM52.

parameters.name: sourceAddr
parameters.description: source address of the PG or null address (0xFE) for wildcard
